Specialty Cakes

Need a birthday cake?  Do you have a special event coming up? We can customize a cake, with any of our flavors above, to fit your needs. Just drop us a line here with your info and our team will follow up with you.  


**Specialty cake orders are available for pickup or delivery in the local Birmingham, AL area. We do not ship specialty cakes. ** 

A two week minimum notice is required on ALL specialty cake orders,


RUSH ORDERS (7 DAYS OR LESS) will incur an additional $25 convenience fee.
